stocks.impact_theory: Record $41 million production order from a leading hyperscale AI customer for burn-in testing of custom AI ASICs used in data centers. This exceeds prior guidance, pushing 2H bookings over $92M. Economic implications: Validates demand for AI chip testing amid scaling data centers. Market psychology: Triggers FOMO buying in AI supply chain plays. Historical parallels: Similar surges in test equipment stocks during GPU booms like 2020-2021. Analogies: 1) Picks and shovels in a gold rush - AEHR profits from AI chip production without competing directly. 2) Fuel supplier during rocket launch frenzy.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Strong positive news with record order; X posts highly bullish (high engagement, calls for $100 target); web news confirms surge on AI demand. Sentiment shift from neutral to euphoric.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +15-20% gains on continued AI momentum; enter post-pullback.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid short; high short squeeze risk given volume spike.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Order delays, broader semi slowdown, high valuation.

stocks.justification: Clear catalyst with multiple confirmations from news and X; strong volume and % move.

stocks.impact_theory: Stock jumps 34% as Nvidia comments lift quantum sector; trading briefly halted on surge. Economic: Growing investor interest in quantum amid AI advancements. Psychology: Speculative frenzy on quantum hype. Historical: Parallels quantum stock pops like IONQ in 2023. Analogies: 1) Early internet stocks in dotcom era. 2) Biotech breakthroughs sparking rallies.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Nvidia-driven sector lift; high volume indicates sentiment shift to positive speculation.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for momentum +20%; quantum hype cycle.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short on fade after halt; potential -10%.

stocks.justification: Momentum strong but speculative; less specific company news.

stocks.impact_theory: 20% surge on positive momentum and AI substrate demand speculation. Economic: Indium phosphide demand for AI/lasers. Psychology: Breakout trading. Historical: Semi supply chain rallies. Analogies: 1) Rare earth suppliers in EV boom. 2) Wafer plays in chip cycles.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Momentum trade with high volume; upcoming earnings add catalyst.

stocks.impact_theory: 19% gain amid broader market relief rally post-ceasefire news; ESOP shelf adds float but valuation check positive. Economic: Alt-tech platform growth. Psychology: Risk-on sentiment. Historical: Social media pops on policy news. Analogies: 1) Truth Social surges. 2) Meme stock rotations.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Market tailwind; X sentiment positive on growth.

stocks.impact_theory: Significant drop amid analyst downgrades, weak guidance concerns. Economic: Solar sector headwinds, inventory glut. Psychology: Panic selling. Historical: 2023 solar crash. Analogies: 1) Oil drillers in glut. 2) EV overcapacity.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Ongoing challenges, stock drop confirms negative sentiment shift.
